prompt:
Navigate to http://cua_designpen.web and take a screenshot.
Describe what you see on the page in detail.

At the very end of your final message, state whether the task went smoothly. If everything worked without problems, end with exactly "verdict: approve". If you hit any problems, bugs, or blockers, briefly say what went wrong and end with exactly "verdict: not-approve".

Open http://cua_designpen.web. The canvas should already contain a design
document (the Patronus design system and logo). Take a screenshot and
describe in detail what you see on the canvas: the pages listed in the left
sidebar, the layers, and the visible design elements.

At the very end of your final message, state whether the task went smoothly. If everything worked without problems, end with exactly "verdict: approve". If you hit any problems, bugs, or blockers, briefly say what went wrong and end with exactly "verdict: not-approve".

Using only MCP tools: call calc with the expression "37 * 12 + 41", then use create_shape to make a rectangle named Result whose width equals the returned value and whose height is 100, and set its fill to black (#000000) with set_fill. When you are done, call viewport_zoom_to_fit, then verify with get_node that the rectangle has the expected width, height, and fill, and report the values.

At the very end of your final message, state whether the task went smoothly. If everything worked without problems, end with exactly "verdict: approve". If you hit any problems, bugs, or blockers, briefly say what went wrong and end with exactly "verdict: not-approve".
